mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, banner_idx, title, file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, add_date, use_yn, banner_link, print_seq FROM CMS_BANNER WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY print_seq ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BANNER WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}

SELECT homepage_id, banner_idx, title, file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, add_date, use_yn, banner_link, print_seq FROM CMS_BANNER WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND banner_idx = #{banner_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_BANNER WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND banner_idx = #{banner_idx}
